title: Section 2: Pretext of Crime
description: In this section, we ask you to answer questions relating to the alleged reasons behind a hate crime. While we understand that the following list of alleged reasons may not be exhaustive, please select the ones most closely mentioned in the media report.

title: Section 3: Evidence of Hate Crime
description: In this section, we ask questions regarding the evidence provided in the media report based on which it can be ascertained that the crime was a hate crime.

title: Section 4: Place and Date of Violent Crime
description: In this section, we ask factual questions regarding the place and date of the violent crime. Please note that the date of the crime may not be the same as the date of reporting. If the date of the crime is not available, please use the date of reporting as the effective date.

title: Section 5: Identity of the Victim(s)
description: In this section, we ask questions regarding the identity of the victim(s).

title: Section 6: Identity of the Attacker(s)
description: In this section, we ask questions regarding the identity of the attacker(s).

title: Section 7: Nature of Harm
description: In this section, we ask questions regarding the nature of harm caused by the incident of violence.

title: Section 8: Weapons of Violence
description: In this section, we ask about the types of weapons used in the violence.

title: Section 9: Role of the Police / Civil Administration / Elected Representatives
description: In this section, we ask questions regarding the role of the state and its representatives.

title: Section 10: Violence as Performance
description: In this section, we aim to understand the role of onlookers and bystanders.

title: Section 11: Source of Information
description: In this section, we ask you to provide the source of information for this incident of violence by adding at least two credible media sources.
